sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, bit_column BITSTRING, interval_column INTERVAL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, bit_column, interval_column) VALUES (1, '0110010'::BITSTRING, INTERVAL '1 HOUR');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, bit_column, interval_column) VALUES (2, '1111111'::BITSTRING, INTERVAL '2 HOUR');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, bit_column, interval_column) VALUES (3, '0000000'::BITSTRING, INTERVAL '3 HOUR');
SELECT id, set_bit(bit_column, 0, 1) + INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS new_interval FROM test_table WHERE set_bit(bit_column, 2, 0) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (set_bit(bit_column, 4, 1) + INTERVAL (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) HOUR) AS updated_interval FROM test_table WHERE set_bit(bit_column, 3, 1) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, set_bit(bit_column, 1, 0) AS modified_bit, interval_column + INTERVAL 1 HOUR FROM test_table WHERE interval_column IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, set_bit(bit_column, 2, 1) AS altered_bit FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM test_table) + 1;
WITH updated AS (SELECT id, set_bit(bit_column, 5, 1) AS new_bit FROM test_table) SELECT id, new_bit + INTERVAL 5 HOUR AS final_interval FROM updated HAVING final_interval IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE (set_bit(bit_column, 0, 1) + interval_column) IS NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table AS SELECT id, set_bit(bit_column, 6, 0) AS tmp_bit FROM test_table WHERE id > 0;
SELECT temp.id, temp.tmp_bit + INTERVAL (SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM interval_column)) FROM test_table) HOUR AS adjusted_interval FROM temp_table temp;
DELETE FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE set_bit(bit_column, 4, 0) IS NULL) AND interval_column + INTERVAL 1 HOUR = INTERVAL '3 HOUR';
